name: deckard
description: Minimal FL-style web DAW in Tish

scripts.build: cd ../tish && cargo run --bin tish -q -- compile --target js ../tish-midi/src/main.tish -o ../tish-midi/dist/bundle.js
scripts.build:counter: cd ../tish && cargo run -p tish -- compile --target js src/lattish/examples/counter-main.tish -o dist/counter-bundle.js
scripts.gateway: cd ../tish && cargo run --bin tish -q --features ws,process,http -- run ../tish-midi/services/gateway/main.tish
scripts.agent: cd ../tish && cargo run --bin tish -q --features ws,process,http,regex -- run ../tish-midi/services/agent-worker/main.tish
scripts.token-demo: cd ../tish && cargo run --bin tish -q --features ws,process -- run ../tish-midi/services/token-stream-demo/main.tish
